problem id: a91414ee
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00111110 -> 01111111
  00100100 -> 01001010
  00011010 -> 00110101
  11011001 -> 10111111
  00000100 -> 00001000
  10001111 -> 00010110
  01001110 -> 10011000
  10010001 -> 00101011

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 00011010
